title: AllCreateMods
description: A modpack that contains all the mods that add things to the mod create.
body:
**AllCreateMods** is a modpack focused on automation, engineering, and construction, thanks to the Create mod and its best addons (all those with more than 10,000 installs).
You'll find:

- Moving machines, visual and interactive production lines
- Automated systems for mining, farming, cooking, sorting, and more
- Trains, gears, motors, fluids, and dynamic structures
- A complete experience without unnecessary mods: everything is designed around Create

Whether you're a beginner or an expert, AllCreateMods offers you an ideal sandbox for building factories and logistics systems, and exploring Minecraft from a new, technical yet accessible perspective.

<details>
<summary>How to install?</summary>
  
### How to Install

Depending on your launcher, the installation method is different

<details>
<summary>Modrinth App</summary>
  
Download links : [https://modrinth.com/app](https://modrinth.com/app)

Open Modrinth App

Click on the search button

Search on the search entry "AllCreateMods"

Click on the modpack with the name you specified/Click on "Install" button

Chose your modpack "Version" (On version tab) and click "Install" button
</details>

<details>
<summary>Prism Launcher</summary>

Download links : https://prismlauncher.org/download/

Open Prism Launcher

Add Instance

Chose modrinth button

Search on the search entry "AllCreateMods"

Click on the modpack with the name you specified

Chose your modpack version and click install button
</details>

<details>
<summary>Curseforge</summary>

> ## ⚠️ **WARNING**
> The Curseforge version of the modpack has been modified compared to the Modrinth version. Here > are the changes:
> - Older versions of the modpack are not available on Curseforge.
> - Fabric mods have been removed to allow uploading, as Curseforge does not allow uploading mods from two different loaders (in our case, Neoforge and Fabric).
> - "Create Man of Many Planes" has been removed due to licensing restrictions.
> - "Emi Create Shematics" has been removed due to licensing restrictions.

Download links : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/allcreatemods

Open Curseforge App

Install Minecraft

Click on the search button

Search on the search entry "AllCreateMods"

Click on the modpack with the name you specified/Click on "Install" button

Chose your modpack version (On "Versions" tab) and click "Install" button

</details>

<details>
<summary>Vanilla Launcher </summary>
  
Tutorial unavailable, but you can install this modpack using the default launcher.
If you would like a tutorial, please use Modrinth App, Prism Launcher, or Curseforge.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary> Compatibility + Information </summary>

### Compatibility + Information

Here is the compatibility information for loaders and launchers

## Loaders

> ## 🗒️ **NOTE**
> Depending on the loader, the mods may be different. So note that each version of the modpack from one loader to another is independent and does not necessarily follow the same mods and updates.

| Information | Forge | Fabric | Quilt | Neoforge |
|-------------|:------:|:------:|:-----:|:----:|
| Compatible | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Loader Version | 47.1.44 | 0.14.22 - 0.18.6 | ❌ | 21.1.193 - 21.1.229 |
| Minecraft Version | 1.20.1 | 1.19.2 - 1.20.1 | ❌ | 1.21.1 |
| Updated regularly | ❌ | ❌ |❌ | ✅ |

## Launchers

| Information | Minecraft Launcher | Modrinth App | CurseForge | Prism Launcher + MultiMC |
|-------------|:--------------------:|:--------------:|:------------:|:---------------------------:|
| Compatible | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Easy Installation | ❌ | ✅ | ✅  | ✅ |
| Easy Upgrade | ❌ | ✅ | ✅  | ✅ |
| Add Mods | ✅ | ✅ | ✅  | ✅ |
</details>
